home.hero_subtitle: The fastest and most beautiful AI tasting note, Barnote
home.feat1_desc: Create and share your own tasting notes!
home.feat2_desc: Fast tasting notes using barcode recognition and AI label scanning
home.feat3_desc: Follow feature provided, share with users who have similar tastes
home.feat4_desc: Enjoy your drink now! Register it as consumed and we'll remind you to write a note later.
home.feat5_desc: Share your tasting notes freely on social media and the web
home.feat6_desc: Write and manage your sensuous tasting notes without product sales or ads
home.recent_prod_sub: Check out the special drinks users just tasted

user.no_notes_desc: This user hasn't written any tasting notes yet.
user.no_fav_desc: This user has no favorite products.

note.not_found_desc: Please try again in a moment.
note.author: Author

policy.title: Politique de confidentialité
policy.section1_desc: Barnote (hereinafter 'Company') processes personal information for the following purposes. It will not be used for other purposes, and prior consent will be sought if the purpose changes.
policy.s1_item1: Confirmation of intent to join and provision of membership service
policy.s1_item2: Analysis of tasting notes and taste information, provision of customized service
policy.s1_item3: Customer inquiry response and complaint handling
policy.section2_desc: The Company collects the following personal information for smooth service provision.
policy.s2_item1: Required: Email, password, nickname, device info
policy.s2_item3: Service usage records: Access logs, IP info, tasting notes, follows, etc.
policy.section3_title: 3. Retention and Use Period of Personal Information
policy.section3_desc: In principle, after the purpose of processing personal information is achieved, the information is destroyed without delay. (Unless required to be kept by law)
policy.section4_title: 4. Rights and Duties of Data Subject
policy.section4_desc: Users can query or modify their registered personal information and request withdrawal of consent and cancellation of membership.
policy.section5_desc: For inquiries regarding personal information protection, complaints, etc., please contact below.

terms.title: Conditions d'utilisation
terms.section1_desc: The purpose of these Terms is to define the rights, obligations, and responsibilities of the Company and Users regarding the use of the Barnote service.
terms.s2_item1: 'User' means a member who receives services according to these terms.
terms.s2_item2: 'Member' means a person who can use the service provided by the company.
terms.s2_item3: 'Content' means information, images, etc. posted by members within the service.
terms.section3_desc: The Company may revise these Terms within the scope of not violating related laws if reasonable grounds arise.
terms.section4_desc: Users must not commit unfair acts such as theft of information or infringement of intellectual property rights; violating this may result in deletion.
terms.section5_desc: The Company is not liable for free services unless specified by law.
terms.section6_desc: Disputes related to service use shall be resolved by agreement, otherwise filed with a competent court.
